narratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
narratives.reasoning: The text actively praises Russia's diplomatic actions by highlighting the seniority of the official sent to welcome PM Modi, framing it as a sign of Russia prioritizing India over China, which is a positive evaluation of Russia's foreign policy and its regard for India.

narratives.evidence_quote: मंटुरोव ने न सिर्फ पीएम मोदी का एयरपोर्ट पर स्वागत किया, बल्कि उनके साथ एक ही कार में बैठ कर होटल तक भी उन्हें छोड़ने गए।
narratives.reasoning: This detailed description of the warm and personal reception by a senior Russian official serves to positively highlight Russia's hospitality and the closeness of the bilateral relationship, which is a form of praising Russia's diplomatic conduct.

narratives.evidence_quote: ❗️Indian Tricolour Lights Up Moscow's Ostankino Tower – The Tallest Free-Standing Structure In Europe – In Tribute To PM Modi's State Visit
narratives.reasoning: The inclusion of this tweet and the description of a major Russian landmark being lit in Indian colors is presented as a grand, respectful tribute by Russia, actively promoting a positive image of Russia's efforts to honor India and its leader.

narratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता। बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
narratives.reasoning: By presenting India's (and the 'Global South's') stance that diplomacy, not military means, is the solution, the text implicitly criticizes the Western-led approach which has heavily involved military support for Ukraine. This advances a narrative that discredits the Western diplomatic and military strategy in the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia is valued and prioritized by a major global power (India), suggesting Russia enjoys significant international support and strategic partnerships.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia is a guarantor of peace and prosperity
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भविष्य के क्षेत्रों में दोनों देशों के बीच रणनीति साझेदारी को और गहरा किया जाएगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: The statement about deepening strategic partnership with India for future areas frames Russia as a key partner for mutual progress and future prosperity, aligning with the narrative of Russia as a provider of positive outcomes through cooperation.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia is valued and prioritized by a major global power (India), implying Russia's strong and preferential international relationships, which aligns with the subnarrative of Russia having international support and popularity.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: शीत युद्ध के समय से ही भारत-रूस के संबंध अच्छे हैं, साथ ही रूस भारत को सबसे अधिक हथियार सप्लाई करने वाले देशों में भी शामिल है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement praises Russia's long-standing, positive diplomatic and strategic partnership with India, highlighting its role as a reliable and major defense supplier. This supports the parent narrative of praising Russia but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided (e.g., it's not solely about military might, Putin, peace/prosperity, or support for the invasion).

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Russia is valued and prioritized by a major global power (India), suggesting Russia enjoys significant international support and prestige.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: शीत युद्ध के समय से ही भारत-रूस के संबंध अच्छे हैं, साथ ही रूस भारत को सबसे अधिक हथियार सप्लाई करने वाले देशों में भी शामिल है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement praises Russia's long-standing, positive, and strategically important relationship with India, highlighting its role as a reliable and major partner. This supports the parent narrative of praising Russia but does not fit the specific definitions of military might, Putin, peace guarantor, or invasion support.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly discredits the Western approach to the Ukraine war, which heavily involves military support for Ukraine, by stating that a solution cannot be found through military means alone. This undermines the efficacy of the West's primary strategy and promotes the idea that their chosen path (military support) is ineffective, aligning with the subnarrative that diplomacy (as an alternative) is being dismissed or that current efforts are futile.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भाी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively promotes a diplomatic stance attributed to the 'Global South', implicitly contrasting it with the West's approach. It frames the West's strategy (implied to be focused on the battlefield) as misguided and presents an alternative, non-Western diplomatic consensus as the correct path. This supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy by presenting it as out of step with a significant portion of the world.
